caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses is positioned against a solid black background, appearing as a lecturer or presenter. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring a decorative embroidered neckline with small red and white floral patterns, complemented by a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her garment. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a logo featuring a stylized sun icon and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, she is captured from the chest up, speaking and gesturing with her facial expressions. Her eyes are closed in the initial scene, but they open in the following frames as she continues to talk, with her mouth moving to articulate words. The background and her positioning remain static, while the only changes are the subtle movements of her head and facial features as she speaks.
